title: Caracal Authority Revocation Event
description: Flat-field payload published to caracal.sessions.revoke for Authority record, governed Session, and Delegation revocation anchors.

session_id.description: Authority record ID; the field name is retained as a versioned wire key.

sid.description: Authority record ID carried by the raw JWT sid claim.

root_sid.description: Root authority record ID carried by the raw JWT root_sid claim.
